steps.name: Maya Character Reference Generation
issues: First attempt timed out on 4th image (wise expression), regenerated successfully in scene batch

steps.name: Video Compilation (FFmpeg)
issues: Generated images were not exactly 9:16 aspect ratio (NVIDIA Flux doesn't enforce exact ratios)

steps.name: Aspect Ratio Fix
steps.method: Scale height to 1920, center crop width to 1080

requirements_check.maya_character_consistent: PASS (4 reference images for future videos)

nvidia_flux.notes: 1 timeout on maya_wise.png, regenerated successfully in batch

byteplus_seedance.reason: Text-to-video API only, not image-to-video. FFmpeg used instead.

recommendations_for_improvement: Generate images at exact target resolution (9:16) to avoid cropping/quality loss
Consider using image-to-video API if available for smoother scene transitions
Add text overlays for key phrases ($50,000, $5M, etc.) during video compilation
Implement audio generation (ElevenLabs/Murf AI) or prepare script for manual voiceover
Test video on actual YouTube Shorts player to verify formatting
